Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

(19 comments)

This patch is probably too big, and at the same time doesn't clean up all of the style issues.

I'm giving it +1 only because it doesn't appear to have any conflicts right now, so maybe it will slip through, but otherwise it should be split into separate files for the large file changes, and also (or separately) clean up the alignment of local variable declarations if we are in there changing every function anyway...

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Passed enforced test review-ldiskfs-dne-arm on RHEL 8.8/aarch64, RHEL 8.8/x86_64 uploaded by Trevis Autotest 2 from trevis-108vm25: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/ec4eda6f-cef3-41b1-addd-b702d6afe1e4 ran 5 tests.

commit.subject: LU-6142 lfsck: Fix style issues under lustre/lfsck
commit.message:
LU-6142 lfsck: Fix style issues under lustre/lfsck

This patch fixes issues reported by checkpatch
for all files under folder lustre/lfsck

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lfsck
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I7fed1e66f82c691d94198390ad89e91db9bfcdea
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54165
Reviewed-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
